title: Fifa World Cup 2026 Last Dance Documentary Poster
sourceTitle: Fifa World Cup 2026 Last Dance Documentary Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic FIFA World Cup 2026 legacy poster for legendary Portuguese football player in a dramatic farewell campaign portrait, built around the cinematic farewell title Ultra-realistic FIFA World Cup 2026 poster, dramatic black-and-white cinematic portrait of a football player staring directly into the camera, intense eyes glowing. Subject: legendary Portuguese football player in a dramatic farewell campaign portrait stares directly into the camera with intense eyes, hyper-detailed skin texture, sweat, pores, fingers touching Portugal flag paint streaks on both cheeks, and legendary athlete energy. Scene: Dark stadium background fades into black with emotional final-tournament atmosphere, powerful documentary drama, and vibrant national color details against monochrome grading. Composition: Centered symmetrical close portrait; RONALDO appears in small elegant spacing above the title, Ultra-realistic FIFA World Cup 2026 poster, dramatic black-and-white cinematic portrait of a football player staring directly into the camera, intense eyes glowing occupies the lower half in massive bold serif typography, followed by ONE LAST TOURNAMENT. ONE LAST DREAM. and FIFA WORLD CUP 2026. Signature Elements: Preserved fifa world cup 2026 last dance documentary poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: ESPN x Netflix poster aesthetic, Netflix sports documentary mood, FIFA promotional artwork influence, black-and-white selective color photography, high-end magazine cover finish, photorealistic 8K poster art. Color Palette: High-contrast monochrome base with vibrant national flag colors on the cheeks, white cinematic typography, dark stadium blacks, subtle eye glow, and selective color accents. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, deep shadows, intense frontal portrait contrast, faint stadium backlight, subtle glowing eyes, and documentary-grade poster exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
